mapper.select: /* wms-wif-dasapi-sql-oracle.xml - selectOubboundHeaderByPreObHdKey - 신규 릴리즈코드 조회 BY 로봇DAS 박스추가 */ SELECT OH.CTKEY ,OH.OWKEY ,OH.OBHDKEY ,OH.WBLNO ,BOX.BOXNM FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OH INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_BOX BOX ON OH.CTKEY = BOX.CTKEY AND OH.RECOMBOXBARCODE = BOXBARCODE WHERE OH.CTKEY = #{ctKey} AND OH.OWKEY = #{owKey} AND OH.PREOBHDKEY = #{obHdKey}

/* wms-wif-dasapi-sql-oracle.xml - selectOutboundDetailByRobDasBoxAdd - 출고상세 조회 BY 로봇DAS 포장박스 추가 */ SELECT OD.CTKEY ,OD.OWKEY ,OD.OBHDKEY ,OD.OBDTKEY ,OD.EXPCTQTY ,OD.ICKEY FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OH INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_DT OD ON OH.CTKEY = OD.CTKEY AND OH.OWKEY = OD.OWKEY AND OH.OBHDKEY = OD.OBHDKEY WHERE OD.CTKEY = #{ctKey} AND OD.OWKEY = #{owKey} AND OD.OBHDKEY = #{obHdKey} AND OD.ICKEY = #{icKey}
